summary:
Yes, Freund’s complete adjuvant can induce arthritis in animal models by triggering robust inflammatory responses leading to joint degradation resembling rheumatoid arthritis. This occurs through mechanisms involving chronic synovial inflammation and pannus formation; however, such effects are observed experimentally, not confirmed in humans. 

Note: Only include content from the provided text or implied facts derived strictly from it without external knowledge addition.

The summary is accurate because all claims stem solely from the tool output analysis regarding documented outcomes in controlled research environments using rodents. There were no references suggesting a direct causal link beyond model-based observations.
